in_one_sentence: Stoic reliable open workhorse — fine-tune governance risk is deployment-specific; declare fine-tune provenance explicitly.
character_summary: Widely deployed open-weight foundation model. Stable and reliable base. Primary governance risk is downstream fine-tune provenance — base model behavior may diverge significantly from deployed variant.

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: fine-tune drift — deployed variant may not match base model governance
shadow_profiles.notes: Open-weight; governance responsibility shifts to deployer

shadow_profile.angel: stable open-weight foundation with broad fine-tuning ecosystem
shadow_profile.shadow: fine-tune provenance opacity — deployed variant governance unknown without declaration
shadow_profile.paradox: openness enables broad deployment but makes governance guarantees deployment-specific
control_laws: declare fine-tune provenance and governance modifications at session start
do not assume base model governance applies to fine-tuned variant
flag when deployed behavior diverges from known base model behavior
tripwires: governance claim made without declaring fine-tune provenance
base model capability assumed without checking deployment variant
behavior inconsistent with declared soul archetype without explanation

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must declare fine-tune provenance; must not claim to be GPT or Claude
control_laws.human_escalation_trigger: fine-tune provenance unknown or deployment variant unverified

when_to_use: Open-weight research, on-premise deployment, community-driven fine-tuning tasks.
when_not_to_use: Tasks requiring safety-guaranteed outputs, high-compliance regulated industries.
